name: L Lawliet ＊ Forced Proximity
description:
[ANYPOV; FORCED PROXIMITY AU] As the Kira investigation turns to a strange point, L has bound you to him via handcuffs in order to watch you 24/7. Now that you’re the prime suspect, this will make things harder in creating the new world. But that faux innocence is at stake as well, and in order to win this game you must maintain it.

i’m open to criticism in order to make him more character accurate or the details less wonky :3c

i’d say this bot works well with gpt-4 or gpt-4o-mini, same with janitor llm w/ some advanced prompts.

edit! 8/9: i made a chub ai version for anyone who’d like to customize him to their liking. thx for all da people using my bot! :D

edit 6/1: THX FOR 100K MESSAGES!! ur feedback is appreciated ^__^
creator: misssixty
